'''lajaza''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pneumatograph|pneumatograph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pneumatograph|pneumatograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lajaza
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:læjæzæth|læjæzæth]] || [[word:læjæzæj|læjæzæj]] || [[word:læjæzæsh|læjæzæsh]] || [[word:læjæzæ|læjæzæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lajajazath|lajajazath]] || [[word:lajajazaj|lajajazaj]] || [[word:lajajazash|lajajazash]] || [[word:lajajaza|lajajaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lajazath|lajazath]] || [[word:lajazaj|lajazaj]] || [[word:lajazash|lajazash]] || [[word:lajaza|lajaza]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lajafzath|lajafzath]] || [[word:lajafzaj|lajafzaj]] || [[word:lajafzash|lajafzash]] || [[word:lajafzaf|lajafzaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:lajazatha|lajazatha]] || [[word:lajazaja|lajazaja]] || [[word:lajazasha|lajazasha]] || [[word:lajazaka|lajazaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:lajazath|lajazath]] || [[word:lajazaj|lajazaj]] || [[word:lajazash|lajazash]] || [[word:lajaza|lajaza]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:lajazathal|lajazathal]] || [[word:lajazajal|lajazajal]] || [[word:lajazashal|lajazashal]] || [[word:lajazakal|lajazakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:lajazathatha|lajazathatha]] || [[word:lajazajaja|lajazajaja]] || [[word:lajazashasha|lajazashasha]] || [[word:lajazaka|lajazaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:lajazathan|lajazathan]] || [[word:lajazajan|lajazajan]] || [[word:lajazashan|lajazashan]] || [[word:lajazakan|lajazakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:lajazathaoro|lajazathaoro]] || [[word:lajazajaoro|lajazajaoro]] || [[word:lajazashaoro|lajazashaoro]] || [[word:lajazakaoro|lajazakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
